scripts.sqitch:deploy:docker: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$p=(Get-Location).Path; docker run --rm --network docker_default -e PGPASSWORD=esg -v "$p/sql:/work/sql" -w /work/sql sqitch/sqitch deploy db:pg://postgres:esg@esg_db:5432/esg-os"
scripts.sqitch:verify:docker: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$p=(Get-Location).Path; docker run --rm --network docker_default -e PGPASSWORD=esg -v "$p/sql:/work/sql" -w /work/sql sqitch/sqitch verify db:pg://postgres:esg@esg_db:5432/esg-os"
